ExpectedBVHTypeName: One professional has a product or platform that can be sold to, sponsored by, or validated through the other professional.

One professional needs talent, capability or specialist delivery capacity that the other can provide or access.
One professional or organisation requires a supplier, technology vendor, implementation partner or delivery specialist.
The pair share employers, institutions, sectors or contacts that reduce trust friction and increase conversion probability.
The introduction creates second-order value by unlocking a wider network, community, portfolio, programme or sector ecosystem.
